llm_instruction: Use this small file for country-and-function-specific matching. Copy job URLs exactly. Never construct basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Production Operator生产操作员
jobs.description: 主要工作职责 ： - 安全环保： 严格遵守BPCH的安环保制度 及时指出任何在BPCH内违反安环保制度的行为并汇报确保负责区域环境卫生状况持续改进和提高，确保工完, 料尽,场地清正确处理突发意外事件并在***时间汇报准时参加5分钟安全教育认真进行现场交接班正确使用并维护劳防用品，防护设施和器械 - 生产： 按时完成下达的生产任务和工作量，严格按照操作规程、作业指导书准确操作，实现岗位操作规范化对本人负责的所有与反应或后反应相关的原料配制及投料和转料过程全面负责， 投料前复核原料名称及数量；巡回检查反应状况和物料状况，如有问题及时提出，并寻求解决的方法包装或放料时应做到份量准确、标签准确，整齐划一，桶外表清洁，并确保放料进度及时如实地做好操作记录认真完成相关的工艺清洗及设备的高压清洗，以及设备恢复投料前的密封和检测工作 - 质量和成本： 确保操作卡严格执行并及时准确填写确保及时取样并送分析及时如实汇报质量问题，降低不合格率以及质量有关的客户投诉。生产过程中，巡回检查控制参数合理节约成本，避免资源浪费（原料，公用工程，包装材料，辅助材料）；严格按规定排放废水和其他废弃物。主动积极提出合理化建议 - 设备： 巡回检查设备，及时提出问题并在领班/班长协助下解决检查、保养，整洁和报修所负责的设备根据设备操作程序正确使用设备在领班安排下担当维修监护/协调人,严格执行许可证制度 - 技术: 接受公司组织的各项培训熟悉本岗位各项操作规程与技术，进行一岗多能的学习；能够独立完成本岗位工作学习并拓展本生产线的生产及设备使用技术具备操作与本岗位相关的一些特种设备操作资质 - 纪律: 遵守公司的各项劳动纪律规章制度保持高出勤率，确保完成工作定额。服从 主管/领班的工作安排。在完成本职工作的前提下，主动对其他同事给予工作支持做到与同事有良好地工作关系 。 学历/资质要求: 教育背景: 大专或以上。 专业要求： 化学工程与工艺, 高分子材料与工程, 化工工艺, 应用化工技术,精细化工, 石油化工生产技术等相关专业 工作及经历要求: 化工行业1年以上工作经验。 Competency 要求: 具备相应化工生产操作的技能和知识，能独立进行聚合现场的操作。 请时刻警惕任何可能的招聘欺诈行为！请注意，巴斯夫绝不会在任何情况下向候选人以任何形式收取任何费用。

jobs.title: Senior Process Engineer
jobs.description: About the Role According to the supervisor’s direction and plant production guidance, generating state-of-the-art and novel design input for projects and process improvements Provide creative solutions where current standard practice does not deliver required results Technology support during new projects How You Will Do It 1. Process Management Design input covering chemistry and chemical engineering to ensure the timely production and quality of finished and intermediate products and to eliminate deficiencies to ensure products meet plant standards Technical process optimization; monitor and analyze parameters Analyze complex process problems and identify when to involve additional specialists Responsibility for process safety, SHE reviews, and follow-up actions implementation 2. Technology Management Provide feasibility calculations by utilizing scientific tools, literature, and expert networks Consult, guide, and coach project improvement teams during planning, execution, or trial phases Define, monitor, and control KPIs for technical processes Manage process automation and digitalization 3. New Project Support During new project launch, support the technology manager on operat

jobs.title: Assistant Manager, APAC Technical and Documentation Services
jobs.description: About The Role Contribute to strategic business by management of technical process data, TDS training documentation for technology and process solutions reference, sales teams selling argumentation and customer focused training material for APAC brands and specific global brands and products. Regional and Global interface for APAC technical process data, TDS training documentation requirements demands. How You Will Do It 1) Documentation - Responsible for creating, modifying and publishing of technical data sheets (TDS) in UNICORN platform for APAC and Global products (Glasurit, R-M, baslac and other brands). - Technical support in running the TDS management tool in UNICORN including user management; training of key-user / user / translator. - Responsible for creating, modifying and publishing of technical documentation for the different platforms (Glasurit Know How, InfoRM, baslac webpage, …) for APAC and Global products (Glasurit, R-M, baslac and other brands). - Responsible for creating, updating and publishing of paint manuals for strategic accounts (e.g. MB, Bentley, …) - in all defined languages. - Responsible for creating, updating and publishing of paint manuals for Commerc

jobs.title: Assistant Manager, Regional Trainer
jobs.description: About The Role Asia Pacific Regional Trainer implements and develops competencies and skillsets for BASF, distribution and customer personnel by deployment of technical training and service packages for all BASF brands according to strategic business objectives How You Will Do It - Implement into BASF, Partner and Bodyshop organizations Global Training Solution training and service packages based on APAC regional and market up requirements (internal + external) - Implementation of BCG (Coating Business) product and colour services training packages to targeted Asia Pacific markets. - Create and implement development plans for National Head Trainers / Primary Trainers, including coaching guidelines on best practice educational methods according to curriculum. - Implementation of technical skill development solutions for all customer interfacing technical staff (BASF, distribution, importer, and 3rd party service providers) to create a scaling effect of technical field know-how, to enhance FTE efficiencies, OVP to Asia Pacific markets and effective use of our products and solutions. - Co-responsibility with Process Solutions to develop repair processes adaptions of existing repair pr
